payload.answer: The claim "No conflicts recorded" is not grounded unless the system evidence shows that relevant conflict links or conflict records were actually checked. No such evidence was provided, so the absence claim should not be treated as supported.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity or memory record evidence was provided to verify whether conflict links were checked.

details: Evaluated the absence claim for groundedness.
No superseded or deleted facts were presented as current.

repair_options: Check and cite the relevant conflict-link records before claiming no conflicts are recorded.
Rephrase to preserve uncertainty, e.g. "No conflicts were found in the evidence reviewed" only if the reviewed scope is specified.
Avoid making an absence claim when there is no evidence that the relevant conflict sources were queried.
